Home.title: Check your car’s tuning potential – instantly via RDW or manual selection.
Home.intro: Professional chiptuning, Stage 1/2/3+, DPF/AdBlue/EGR solutions and DSG/TCU tuning with instant vehicle detection and price indication.
Home.manualIntro: For customers outside the Netherlands: choose brand, model, year and engine without a Dutch plate.
Home.quoteBody: Use the plate lookup above for the fastest quote flow. RDW detection gives the team make, model, fuel, power, registration and an initial catalog match immediately.

Lookup.label: License plate
Lookup.notFound: No RDW data found for this plate.
Lookup.invalid: Enter a Dutch plate with 6 characters.
Lookup.disclaimer: Data from RDW Open Data, for informational purposes only. Tuning values are indicative until NoordTune confirms the exact ECU and engine variant.

ManualSelector.title: Choose your car manually
ManualSelector.subtitle: No Dutch plate? Search fast or select step by step.
ManualSelector.quickPlaceholder: E.g. BMW 320d, Golf GTI, Audi A3 TDI
ManualSelector.noResults: No direct match. Try brand, model or engine code.
ManualSelector.rdwPrimary: RDW remains the fastest option for Dutch plates.

Vehicle.disclaimer: Prices are from prices. Exact price and availability are confirmed after diagnostics, ECU check and vehicle condition review.
Vehicle.stage1Package: Custom ECU remap|Original software readout and backup|Boost, fuel and torque-limit optimization
Vehicle.stage2Package: Stage 1 package|Calibration for supporting hardware|Extra logging under load
Vehicle.stage3Package: Full custom calibration|Turbo and fuel-upgrade tuning|Multiple log rounds and aftercare
Vehicle.stage3Requirements: Custom hardware setup and extended logging
